name: Cory Booker
subject: We must stand with UAW workers in their fight for fair wages, better benefits, and reversal of plant closures that have decimated communities across our country.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Friend, During World War II, my grandfather was an assembly line worker and United Automobile Workers union rep at a Ford plant outside of Detroit. He showed me the power of collective action as a force for good that can improve people's lives and right injustice -- his ability to organize helped my family break out of poverty and get into the middle class. Today, nearly 50,000 members of his same union are on strike against General Motors, fighting for fair wages, better benefits, and the reversal of plant closures that have decimated communities across our country. [**I believe that our country is stronger when our workers can organize and join unions. Add your name if you 're with me.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://bookerlive.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/right-to-organize?source=em_pet_20190916_CB_20190916-pet-CB-righttoorganize-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") **When I 'm president, I'll make sure that workers are empowered again starting on Day One.** But right now in our country, unions are under attack from large corporations, Republicans in Congress, and a conservative Supreme Court. Just this morning, Donald Trump showed a complete lack of respect for the dignity of work when he tweeted about the strike. Corporate power and wealth are growing while workers' wages are stagnant. And we've seen so many Republican-led states undermine the ability of people to organize their workplaces. **The right to unionize is sacred in our country, and right now it 's under assault.** **We must take a stand for what 's right and join UAW workers in solidarity.** [**If you're with me, add your name to show that you believe we should protect a worker's right to unionize. Sign my petition to stand up for people Trump has forgotten.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://bookerlive.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/right-to-organize?source=em_pet_20190916_CB_20190916-pet-CB-righttoorganize-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Together,
Cory **[](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://bookerlive.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/right-to-organize?source=em_pet_20190916_CB_20190916-pet-CB-righttoorganize-actives_actives_button&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0bee/5fca0d19/74eb5385/291e763a/96317209/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0bee/5fca0d19/74eb5385/291e7639/96317209/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0bee/5fca0d19/74eb5385/291e7638/96317209/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0bee/5fca0d19/74eb5385/291e7607/96317209/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0bee/5fca0d19/74eb5385/291e7606/96317209/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0bee/5fca0d19/74eb5385/291e763a/96317209/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

subject: Trump is hearing footsteps
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
Polls show that the main thing Democrats want in a candidate is someone who can defeat Donald Trump. That’s one of the reasons our campaign is gaining momentum so quickly. | [](https://act.yang2020.com/go/1154?t=1&akid=367%2E377263%2EUJnZgg) Friend -- Polls show that the main thing Democrats want in a candidate is someone who can defeat Donald Trump. That’s one of the reasons our campaign is gaining momentum so quickly. We’ve already seen polls showing Andrew defeating Trump by a larger margin than almost any other candidate in this race. **If Andrew’s the nominee, we win. That’s the math. But to get there, we need to spread our message to all the key voters in the early primary states.** [ Pitch in now so we can get Andrew’s message in front of more voters.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/9476?t=2&akid=367%2E377263%2EUJnZgg) This is where you come in, friend. The mainstream media continues to ignore our momentum, so we’re building out our own media plan in Iowa and New Hampshire to air ads speaking directly with the voters who will decide this primary. **[The more money we raise right now, the more air time we can reserve in these competitive markets. So we’re asking you directly: Can you chip in our average online contribution of $23 or more right now?](https://act.yang2020.com/go/9477?t=3&akid=367%2E377263%2EUJnZgg)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/9478?t=4&akid=367%2E377263%2EUJnZgg)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ben_Ray_Luj=C3=A1n?=
subject: RE: Trump rally BACKFIRES
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | **TRUMP: I am going to take New Mexico from Democrats** [**_This is the most important ask I 've ever made of you. Trump just swooped into my home state, held a massive rally, and pledged to turn our state red. I need a historic response -- 2,000 gifts in the next 24-hours -- to make his rally backfire. Every single gift will be emergency-matched. >>_**](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190916_em_fr_b3_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250") I'm asking you to make a critical choice in this moment:

\-- We can either let Trump come into our house, turn this state red, and sabotage our chance to flip the Senate.

**\-- Or we can rise up, send a historic Democratic response, and show Trump that he will NEVER take this state from us.**

Let me be clear: New Mexico is absolutely crucial to winning a Democratic Senate.

I will fight until my last breath to defend it from Trump's snatches.

I'm counting on Democrats nationwide to have our back tonight. Will you rush $5? **This is so critical, your generous gift will be matched for the next 24 hours.** | | ****[**Chip in $5 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190916_em_fr_b3_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")****

****[**Chip in $100 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190916_em_fr_b3_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=100&amounts=5,25,50,250")****

****[**Chip in another amount now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190916_em_fr_b3_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")****

Thank you so much for fighting,

Ben Ray
|
---
[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4a8/18e32a7f/52de8c0b/7bff6c4c/2880741399/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4a8/18e32a7f/52de8c0b/7bff6c4d/2880741399/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4a8/18e32a7f/52de8c0b/7bff6c42/2880741399/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4a8/18e32a7f/52de8c0b/7bff6c43/2880741399/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4a8/18e32a7f/52de8c0b/7bff6c40/2880741399/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4a8/18e32a7f/52de8c0b/7bff6c41/2880741399/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

| Patriot,
Over 230 years ago the U.S. Constitution was written and it still holds up to this day!

They want to take away your health care choices. They want to take away your FREEDOM with their socialist policies. I will not let this happen; I will always uphold the Constitution NO MATTER WHAT!

name: Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak
subject: Cry, my beloved country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10017503/100068708/-803653937?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTg5ZWUzMi01OGQ5LWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=foTie9YFG4_GHr0mn3lsWjtHFya15mVikywPYVKJ8pk=&emci=d09e50a2-53d9-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=be89ee32-58d9-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798&v=hCcsNIISiWo)**
Peter,
My 31 years in the Navy were the best job I’ve ever had – serving my country. My time as Congressman was "pay back" to my country for the healthcare plan that saved my then-four year old daughter’s life from brain cancer. I owed my nation for the life of the one I most love, which is why my refrain during my first congressional campaign was: “I’m a retired Navy admiral, running on national security that begins at home — in health security, for everyone."
People ask "Why now?"
Because **my country is hurting**. It is great, and its people are great, but **our nation — who we are — is scarred by a divide **that must be closed. **We can no longer watch our beloved country cry.** We must have **a leader that people people trust** and who **reminds us of who we really are and what we are capable of when we are united together**.
**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10017504/100068709/1036341175?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTg5ZWUzMi01OGQ5LWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=foTie9YFG4_GHr0mn3lsWjtHFya15mVikywPYVKJ8pk=&refcode=em09172019cry)**
I am a Dad who learned from his daughter’s battle what really matters. I am a sailor who learned from the Navy integrity’s values: service to country, to others above self, with accountability in answering for oneself. I was a Congressman who learned the value of listening to all Americans in my nearly two-to-one Republican District.
I ask you to contribute to my campaign, so I may contribute once more to my nation with **the leadership that is needed to heal our nation**. We have no choice: **we cannot meet the defining challenges of our time without a united America.**
Respectfully,
Joe Sestak
[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10017505/100068710/1036341175?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTg5ZWUzMi01OGQ5LWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=foTie9YFG4_GHr0mn3lsWjtHFya15mVikywPYVKJ8pk=&refcode=em09172019cry)
Come on board. We encourage you to [visit our website](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10017506/100068711/-209557350?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTg5ZWUzMi01OGQ5LWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=foTie9YFG4_GHr0mn3lsWjtHFya15mVikywPYVKJ8pk=&emci=d09e50a2-53d9-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=be89ee32-58d9-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798)
and get involved in these challenging and wonderful times.

name: Tim Walz
subject: My trade mission to Japan and South Korea
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
| My friend, On Friday, I returned from a 6-day trade mission to Japan and South Korea. The message I delivered throughout the trip was straightforward: At a time of uncertainty, I'm committed to keeping Minnesota competitive in the global economy. I'm proud to report that our message was well received. Japan and South Korea are looking for stable trade partners who share their values. And over and over again we heard that our commitment to sustainability, community prosperity, and corporate social responsibility aligns incredibly well with their aspirations. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/1Jt-NGa4OMcUQAug-k8R0O31B9gST1nFcr3Dq2tynpo=/oZne2yl_zH_dmRPTrugUJZP7m9MrZWELaGM9tGNUm4s=?refcode=body&amount=25)
---
My friend,
On Friday, I returned from a 6-day trade mission to Japan and South Korea. The message I delivered throughout the trip was straightforward: At a time of uncertainty, I'm committed to keeping Minnesota competitive in the global economy.
I'm proud to report that our message was well received. Japan and South Korea are looking for stable trade partners who share their values. And over and over again we heard that our commitment to sustainability, community prosperity, and corporate social responsibility aligns incredibly well with their aspirations.
Minnesota is home to more than 35 Japanese-based companies. These trade relationships are vital to our economy, and that's why my goal was to make it clear that if Washington won't lead, Minnesota will.
As we approach 2020, it's never been more important for us to elect partners who will help us strengthen and stabilize our economic relationships, not tear them down.
My campaign is working hard everyday to channel the energy of our One Minnesota movement and get the job done, but they can't keep it up without you. So with our end-of-quarter deadline approaching at the end of the month, I'm reaching out personally to ask:
[**Will you make a contribution of $5 or more to help us reach our $30,000 grassroots goal by September 30th?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/1Jt-NGa4OMcUQAug-k8R0O31B9gST1nFcr3Dq2tynpo=/oZne2yl_zH_dmRPTrugUJZP7m9MrZWELaGM9tGNUm4s=?refcode=body&amount=25)

****[Express Donate: $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/1Jt-NGa4OMcUQAug-k8R0O31B9gST1nFcr3Dq2tynpo=/oZne2yl_zH_dmRPTrugUJZP7m9MrZWELaGM9tGNUm4s=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=_100-p)****
****[Express Donate: $250](https://act.myngp.com/el/1Jt-NGa4OMcUQAug-k8R0O31B9gST1nFcr3Dq2tynpo=/oZne2yl_zH_dmRPTrugUJZP7m9MrZWELaGM9tGNUm4s=?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=_250-p)****
****[Or, donate another amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/1Jt-NGa4OMcUQAug-k8R0O31B9gST1nFcr3Dq2tynpo=/oZne2yl_zH_dmRPTrugUJZP7m9MrZWELaGM9tGNUm4s=?refcode=_other-p)****
Next year is our one guaranteed chance at taking back the Minnesota Senate and holding onto our majority in the Minnesota House.
**Hitting our quarterly budget targets is a minimum requirement of getting the job done.[Help us seize the opportunity. Make a contribution that works for you today.](https://act.myngp.com/el/1Jt-NGa4OMcUQAug-k8R0O31B9gST1nFcr3Dq2tynpo=/oZne2yl_zH_dmRPTrugUJZP7m9MrZWELaGM9tGNUm4s=?refcode=body&amount=25)**
Thank you,
Tim Walz

name: S. Harris, Team Franken
subject: I just made my second donation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
I signed up as a monthly donor to Mike Franken because it was an easy way to multiply my impact and support the campaign.
|
---

| | Friends -- I know that Mike Franken is a leader with integrity -- that's why I decided to support his campaign from day one. Now, without any effort, I've already made my second donation. | [Donate $10 Monthly](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2459/33365068/4a6679e8/3f8ba87e/847968120/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-recurring-sept?refcode=20190917_em&recurring=1&amount=10")
---
When Mike mentioned that his campaign needed 100 monthly donors, I offered to share how easy it was for me.
I've known Mike for years, and I know that he will be the kind of senator who prioritizes what's right for our nation and our future. Rather than the hassle of writing a big check, we set a budget in our family for the support we could afford every month and committed to the campaign.
Now, without any additional effort, I've already made my second donation. That means Mike and his team can plan ahead and make smart investments with my support, and I was able to plan ahead to support him.
[**Can you join me and become a monthly donor to Mike 's campaign today?**](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2459/33365068/4a6679e8/3f8ba87f/847968120/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-recurring-sept?refcode=20190917_em&recurring=1")

name: Jason Yates
subject: VIDEO: The great American experiment
body:
| | Peter, Today, on Constitution Day, we celebrate the founding document that has guided America for more than 200 years. It has set us apart from other democracies around the world as a Constitutional Republic. Founding Father and a signer of the Declaration of Independence, Benjamin Rush said, “I do not believe that the Constitution was the offspring of inspiration, but I am as perfectly satisfied that the Union of the States in its form and adoption is as much the work of a Divine Providence as any of the miracles recorded in the Old and New Testament.” [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k_-ZW-NW8aHpsbNEWJ62bRw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190916com01&n=1) We encourage you to take a few minutes to thank God for this great American experiment that has brought peace and prosperity to Americans and millions of others across the world. [Watch this special video message from Pastor Jack Hibbs of Calvary Chapel in Chino Hills, California](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k_-ZW-NW8aHpsbNEWJ62bRw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190916com01&n=2). [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k_-ZW-NW8aHpsbNEWJ62bRw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190916com01&n=3) **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190916com01&n=4)

name: Andrew Yang
subject: Some thoughts on the strike by the UAW
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
You probably saw the news yesterday that 46,000 GM workers courageously decided to strike at 11:59pm Sunday night -- the first national UAW strike since 2007. | [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=374%2E377263%2EfA1swy) Friends, You probably saw the news today that 46,000 GM workers courageously decided to strike at 11:59pm Sunday night -- the first national UAW strike since 2007. The UAW has been a force for worker equity and fair treatment for decades, even as our economy has stopped working for everyday Americans. GM should value its workers fairly and compensate them what they deserve. The truth is, the entire auto industry is in a tough situation: The union wants higher pay, better benefits, and increased job security for their employees. GM wants to cut costs so it can keep investing in electric vehicles and self-driving cars, and keep their business afloat. No one wants a strike, but workers feel that they don’t have a choice -- so much so that they’re willing to forgo their salaries and accept $250 per week in strike pay. That is dangerously low -- and GM knows it. **So how do we solve this problem? You guessed it. The Freedom Dividend.** A Freedom Dividend of $1,000 per month for every adult would increase these workers’ bargaining power by allowing them to afford to strike and make all workers much harder to exploit. As I’ve said before, it’s easier to push for fair treatment if you don’t have an economic boot on your throat. I know that most, if not all, of the Democratic candidates running for president will make public statements supporting the UAW. But if we really want to support our workers, we need structural reform. We need a Freedom Dividend for all to address the problem facing most Americans -- economic scarcity that prevents us from building the lives we want for ourselves and our families. By investing in our people, we can empower them to fight for better working conditions. I’m running for president to solve the problems that got Donald Trump elected in the first place. This story is just another example of a problem our current politicians simply aren’t equipped to solve. Thanks for being part of this campaign, -Andrew [P.S. We’re coming up on a big end-of-quarter deadline in less than two weeks. If you could chip in any amount to ensure we surprise everyone watching that would be a big help.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/9376?t=2&akid=374%2E377263%2EfA1swy) | **Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can. Your continued generosity helps us keep building this movement.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/9376?t=3&akid=374%2E377263%2EfA1swy)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=4&akid=374%2E377263%2EfA1swy) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=374%2E377263%2EfA1swy) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---

All Rights Reserved
New York, NY

subject: Mitch McConnell is tweeting about Brett Kavanaugh →
body:
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c24/4bef7a87/68b363fa/287f0fe1/2720865682/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

So this happened...
[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c24/4bef7a87/68b363fa/287f0fe0/2720865682/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MTctMS1iIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-september?refcode=em190917-1-b")
Well, Mitch is right in one respect: We DO remember what happened last time.
We remember that Senate Republicans forced Brett Kavanaugh's confirmation through without thoroughly investigating credible claims against him.
We remember that the FBI failed to interview _25 witnesses_ who could have corroborated one of the incidents.
**And we remember that Susan Collins cast a critical vote to confirm Brett Kavanaugh.**
Don't worry, Mitch. We won't forget.

# Legislators, business owners fight for lower business taxes
MANCHESTER — With the state’s $13 billion two-year budget stalled in negotiations, legislators and business leaders advocated Monday afternoon at the Jefferson Mill complex to keep lower employer taxes. The National Federation of Independent Business and the New Hampshire chapter of Americans for Prosperity hosted a roundtable discussion with Senate Republican Leader Chuck Morse of Salem and House Republican Leader Dick Hinch of Merrimack in support of keeping lower state business taxes, which they say will continue to grow the state’s economy. _" January 20th, 2017 will be remembered as the day the people became the rulers of this nation again. The forgotten men and women of our country will be forgotten no longer."_
(U.S. Capitol Steps, 01/20/2017)
---
|
On Inauguration Day, when I was sworn into office, hand over Bible, I promised that you would never be forgotten again, Friend.

For too long, a small group in our nation's capital reaped the rewards of government while the people suffered. Washington flourished, but YOU did not share in its wealth.

**Since then we 've been WINNING for YOU at an unprecedented rate:**
* Unemployment rates are the lowest they've been in decades
* We've created MILLIONS of new jobs
* The Beautiful WALL is being built
* We appointed two fantastic conservative Supreme Court Justices
* America is respected on the world stage again

**America is GREAT again. Now it 's up to YOU to Keep America Great!**

Since you've been such a great supporter, I want to offer you something very exclusive. _(Don 't share this offer!)_

**I am dedicating a wall for a select group of donors who choose to step up at this critical time. Space is limited on the Official 2019 Trump Donor Wall, so be sure to act fast!**

This is the best time for you to make your VERY FIRST contribution to my campaign, and cement your name in political history.

**[Please make your best contribution before 11:59 PM TONIGHT to be one of the FIRST donors to have their name permanently engraved on the Official 2019 Trump Donor Wall.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=038b4d45da5a259ca485b421815e7a57f4d4a3ede1dc0d0bdf66fd7e76a701bcb975b457b7194b3075548ccf7e603df8af0731db8a56048b)**

|

The names that will go on our _Official 2019 Trump Donor Wall_ will belong to the men and women who will have chipped in whatever they can to save our country. They know what WINNING is all about.

Most campaigns (especially the 2020 Democrats) only ever recognize their MEGA-DONORS. But our incredible movement is about so much more than money. We are fueled by tough, hard working Americans who are willing to do whatever it takes to Keep America Great.

These patriots humble me. They remind me why I ran for President in the first place.

I promise you that I will continue to fight for you with every breath in my body and I will never EVER let you down. And now I'm counting on you to not let me down heading into 2020.

name: Tim
subject: what my dad said
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
My dad and I come from a long line of factory workers, team. My family's values -- like so many American families -- were centered around hard work and community.

Those values built this country -- and I believe that's what'll get us back on track. What my dad said is true, **I never back down from a challenge.**

Nobody ever said this race was going to be easy, but I know that we can win it by working together. No shortcuts. No half-measures. Just grassroots energy and a common sense message.

**I would love the honor of standing on the debate stage in October in front of a crowd of fellow Ohioans to lay out our new and better vision for America.[Only you can make that happen. Please contribute to our cause today.](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-october?recurring=true&amount=3&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+Only+you+can+make+that+happen+Please+con&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190917_1_7&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190917_1_7&refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190917_1_7")**

[**https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/fighting-for-you**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-october?recurring=true&amount=3&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2+-+httpssecuretimryanforamericacomfightingf&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190917_1_7&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190917_1_7&refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190917_1_7")

|
---
Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
Contribute now to help Tim take his vision for our future across the United States! [**Donate now.**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9d14/5486deaa/3e65a8f2/dc81eeb/2571799826/VEsF/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-emfooter?amount=5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=3+-+Donate+now&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190917_1_7&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190917_1_7&refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190917_1_7")

**We know email can be overwhelming,**
so if you'd like to receive only the most important updates, you can join our email-lite list [here](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9d14/5486deaa/3e65a8f2/dc81eea/2571799826/VEsC/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://timryan.cp.bsd.net/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190917_1_7&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190917_1_7&refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190917_1_7"), or unsubscribe from all email by [ clicking here.](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9d14/5486deaa/3e65a8f2/dc81eed/2571799826/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZQUWtaVlUwTkJWRVZFVWtWRFNWQkpSVTVVU1VRbEpRPT0iOiIzZTY1YThmMiIsIkpTVlBRa1pWVTBOQlZFVkVUVUZKVEVsT1IxTkZUa1JKUkNVbCI6ImQ3YTlkMTQifQ%3D%3D/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/oneclickunsubscribe/3e65a8f2/d7a9d14?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=5+-++clicking+here&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190917_1_7&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190917_1_7&refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190917_1_7")

clean_body: | My dad and I come from a long line of factory workers, team. My family's values -- like so many American families -- were centered around hard work and community. Those values built this country -- and I believe that's what'll get us back on track. What my dad said is true, I never back down from a challenge. Nobody ever said this race was going to be easy, but I know that we can win it by working together. No shortcuts. No half-measures. Just grassroots energy and a common sense message. I would love the honor of standing on the debate stage in October in front of a crowd of fellow Ohioans to lay out our new and better vision for America. "" "" | Paid for by Tim Ryan for America Contribute now to help Tim take his vision for our future across the United States! subject: Morning Joe just revealed:
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | I'll tell you what I told Morning Joe: [_**I will NEVER let Donald Trump take this critical state from Democrats. I need a MASSIVE response -- 1,500 gifts before midnight -- to counter Trump's vicious, anti-Democratic rally here last night. >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190917_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")

Last night, I watched Donald Trump swoop into my home district.

I watched him hold a massive rally smearing our families.

And I watched him pledge to do everything in his power to flip our state red.

But I just have one thing to say in response:

Every special-interest dollar he floods into our state...

Every false attack ad he runs against me and my fellow Democrats...

Every vicious rally he holds here to turn this state against us...

**_Will never be enough to flip New Mexico red and sabotage Democrats' shot to win the entire Senate._**

These 24 hours after Trump's rally are the most critical we've ever faced.

I need a powerful response -- 1,500 gifts before midnight -- to prove that we will fight with everything we have to rescue this state from Republicans' grasps.

Can I count on your immediate $5? | | ****[**Chip in $5 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190917_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")****

Thank you,

Ben Ray

Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4a9/18e32a7f/5323c0d9/7bfec01e/4260970200/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4a9/18e32a7f/5323c0d9/7bfec01f/4260970200/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4a9/18e32a7f/5323c0d9/7bfec01c/4260970200/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: This Constitution Week, America Welcomes 34,000 New Legal Citizens
body:
Today, we celebrate Constitution Day and Citizenship Day, part of Constitution Week. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b9a7809565&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **This Constitution Week, America Welcomes 34,000 New Legal Citizens**

Today, we celebrate Constitution Day and Citizenship Day, part of Constitution Week.

“On this day, we recognize the signing of the U.S. Constitution and reflect upon the meaning and importance of citizenship and what it means to be an American, whether native or foreign-born,” Ken Cuccinelli, Acting Director of U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services (USCIS), writes for Fox News.

Across the country this week, USCIS will welcome over 34,000 new citizens at more than 300 special naturalization ceremonies in celebration of Constitution Week.

“We believe that U.S. citizenship is the greatest honor and privilege in the world,” he says.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0044e7ea6a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Supreme Court Justice Brett Kavanaugh will apparently receive continuing education in the politics of personal destruction, and this weekend came another round of rumor-mill accusations,” [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=78b70d06c6&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes. “It’s important to understand that this assault on the Justice is part of the left’s larger campaign against the legitimacy of the current Supreme Court and an independent judiciary.”
---
|
---
| President Trump’s USMCA trade deal “will play a critical role in the revitalization of our automobile industry,” Rep. Vicky Hartzler (R-MO) writes in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2f2be9d9e4&e=3ee4985eea). “It has become clear over the last decade that NAFTA’s rules over automobile manufacturing were outdated and were hurting the American auto industry.”
---
|
---
| “Past administrations neglected their constitutional duty, refusing to uphold and enforce our nation’s laws. President Trump is different. He is taking bold, decisive actions to keep America safe and secure – and the numbers prove that his strategy is working,” Rep. Matt Gaetz (R-FL) writes for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4890a30049&e=3ee4985eea). “The number of [border] apprehensions has dropped because every mile of wall makes it harder and harder to get into America illegally.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a8bdc1ad84&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4445e8ef66&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=a87f21eb12)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

body:

| We cannot in good conscience allow Kavanaugh to remain on the Supreme Court.

_**[Join Ed Markey and sign the petition to demand immediate action to impeach Brett Kavanaugh!](http://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dccb/693b8b0a/44f5d98a/72de955a/1640127068/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/impeach-kavanaugh?source=091719_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**_

Read Ed Markey's call for impeachment below:

* * *
> The latest bombshell reporting from the New York Times of new sexual assault allegations against Brett Kavanaugh confirms what we already knew:
>
> Kavanaugh was confirmed after a sham investigation and a GOP-whitewashing of the serious and credible allegations against him.
>
> Justice cannot be served while Kavanaugh sits on our highest court. He must be impeached.
>
> _**[Sign our petition and demand Congress take action to impeach Brett Kavanaugh.](http://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dccb/693b8b0a/44f5d98a/72de955a/1640127068/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/impeach-kavanaugh?source=091719_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**_
>
> The FBI's investigation into sexual assault allegations involving Kavanaugh was a White House cover-up working in coordination with Senate Republicans.
>
> The latest reporting now confirms that Trump's Justice Department didn't even investigate these now corroborated accounts of sexual assault.
>
> We cannot in good conscience allow Kavanaugh to remain on the Supreme Court.
>
> _**[Sign our petition and demand Congress take action to impeach Brett Kavanaugh.](http://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dccb/693b8b0a/44f5d98a/72de955a/1640127068/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/impeach-kavanaugh?source=091719_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**_

> Thanks,

> Ed

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: American kids are ready to tackle climate change. Are you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, According to a _Washington Post_ national survey, almost 60 percent of American teens are scared of climate change and its effects on the planet. They rank it as one of the most important issues facing the country, along with gun policy and healthcare. However, over half of them also said that they are motivated to do something about it, and a quarter of them have already taken concrete actions. We're investigating what engaged voters think about this issue and need 172 more responses by MIDNIGHT: **Will climate change be a critical factor in your vote in 2020?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd12/6e9863e8/14d0c91a/1db0dd41/1620550798/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/al76u3L") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd12/6e9863e8/14d0c91a/1db0dd41/1620550798/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/al76u3L") Thank you for your response. -The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd12/6e9863e8/14d0c91a/1db0dd40/1620550798/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=WDTO20190917a.ND-b&refcode2=4vUT7W1NXI6QBIndlA5A")

name: Mark Warner
subject: Four seats away from flipping the General Assembly
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Even though the 2020 elections are more than a year away, misleading political ads are already running in Virginia -- and now they're targeting Mark.
|
---
| | Derek,

I've spent a lot of time on the road in Virginia lately campaigning for our General Assembly candidates, and one thing is clear to me everywhere I go: _Virginians know our upcoming elections are special._

They also know a few other things:
* Virginians know that America is watching the Commonwealth, and what _we_ do in November could lay the groundwork for _huge_ Democratic victories in 2020.
* They know that we have the opportunity to elect a blue General Assembly in Virginia for the _first_ time in over twenty years.
* And most of all, they know that we're ready to see _change_ happen across Virginia.

That's why I've been out there working to make sure we flip the General Assembly blue this November and then keep Virginia blue in 2020. **And it's why I'm partnering with the Virginia House and Senate Caucuses today.**

**If you 're ready to make change happen in 2019 and 2020, I want to personally ask you to contribute to this joint effort today. Your investment in Democratic victories will be split evenly between my campaign and the Virginia House and Senate Democratic Caucuses.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[DONATE $5](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d0fc/53d9897e/52aaa009/1c8e048c/4153053759/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyNiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA $25](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d0fc/53d9897e/52aaa009/1c8e048a/4153053759/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyNiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-vademscaucuses?express_lane=true&refcode=20190917nd__226__&refcode2=express_lane_3&amount=25")** **[DONATE $50](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d0fc/53d9897e/52aaa009/1c8e0489/4153053759/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyNiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-vademscaucuses?express_lane=true&refcode=20190917nd__226__&refcode2=express_lane_4&amount=50")** **[DONATE $100](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d0fc/53d9897e/52aaa009/1c8e0488/4153053759/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyNiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-vademscaucuses?express_lane=true&refcode=20190917nd__226__&refcode2=express_lane_5&amount=100")** **[CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d0fc/53d9897e/52aaa009/1c8e04f7/4153053759/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyNiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-vademscaucuses?refcode=20190917nd__226__&refcode2=express_lane_other")** Both caucuses are just **TWO SEATS** away from retaking the House of Delegates and the Virginia Senate. They've recruited a record-breaking number of fantastic candidates for this cycle and built strong grassroots support in all corners of the Commonwealth.

I'm telling you, the momentum and enthusiasm across Virginia is real, and I believe we are incredibly close to flipping the General Assembly. And when we've done that, I'm going to keep working with all I've got to hold Virginia's Senate seat and make sure we beat Donald Trump in 2020.

**Derek, an opportunity like this doesn 't come around every year. To win, we'll need all hands on deck.**

**[Will you split a donation between the Virginia House and Senate Democratic Caucuses and my own campaign?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d0fc/53d9897e/52aaa009/1c8e04f6/4153053759/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyNiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-vademscaucuses?refcode=20190917nd__226__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

Onward to November,
Mark | ****[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d0fc/53d9897e/52aaa009/1c8e04f5/4153053759/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyNiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-vademscaucuses?refcode=20190917nd__226__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")****

name: Sri Preston Kulkarni
subject: It's time Congress take action on the opioid crisis!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/JegZPKVgIxnSh9JK_wQdnJFswYlpLJ4ziVzD9NiJuZo=/swTHmKvYKxQha7uoAuAwO4VXnaipaLXPDZ8Nt7lmlDY=?refcode=20190917opioidjaemail)
---

[**SIGN ON NOW: Tell Congress to Take Action on the Opioid Epidemic.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/JegZPKVgIxnSh9JK_wQdnJFswYlpLJ4ziVzD9NiJuZo=/Zank0YhGuPlHo6obm1MI73fk2YR6iJ6xyP-fN_1xv9k=)

Friend,

Almost daily, we hear stories about the overwhelming national scale of the opioid crisis, but too many of our neighbors have come to feel and know the impact of the crisis much more intimately.**Just this month, hospitals across Texas, including some right here in Fort Bend County, filed a lawsuit against major opioid manufacturers to cover rising costs of care for local victims.**

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/JegZPKVgIxnSh9JK_wQdnJFswYlpLJ4ziVzD9NiJuZo=/Zank0YhGuPlHo6obm1MI73fk2YR6iJ6xyP-fN_1xv9k=)

Big Pharma has clearly played a major role in the opioid crisis by misleading the public and the government about the dangers of addictive opioids. **These companies have, in effect, created the opioid crisis which destroyed so many Texans ' lives and are now forcing taxpayers to take on the financial burden of the resulting healthcare costs. **

And while using our local justice system to hold these companies accountable is a good place to start, we need the federal government to step up to the plate, rather than forcing states to solve this issue alone with piecemeal state-by-state lawsuits. **Congress must do more to put an end to opioid deaths for good -- in our community and EVERY community nationwide.[Will you join me in the fight to end the opioid crisis?](https://act.myngp.com/el/JegZPKVgIxnSh9JK_wQdnJFswYlpLJ4ziVzD9NiJuZo=/PCFC2hFdOnG3nV92HKj9l-vOWjEEPDq9mk-mlA4eVBE=)**

| **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.myngp.com/el/JegZPKVgIxnSh9JK_wQdnJFswYlpLJ4ziVzD9NiJuZo=/PCFC2hFdOnG3nV92HKj9l-vOWjEEPDq9mk-mlA4eVBE=)**
---

The opioid crisis has taken a huge toll on our families. And resolving this crisis will take hard work, bipartisanship, and comprehensive legislative reform. But we can't shy away from the work that is required.

[**This can 't wait, friend: Sign your name right now to demand Congress take action to end the opioid epidemic.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/JegZPKVgIxnSh9JK_wQdnJFswYlpLJ4ziVzD9NiJuZo=/PCFC2hFdOnG3nV92HKj9l-vOWjEEPDq9mk-mlA4eVBE=)

**[SIGN ON NOW](https://act.myngp.com/el/JegZPKVgIxnSh9JK_wQdnJFswYlpLJ4ziVzD9NiJuZo=/PCFC2hFdOnG3nV92HKj9l-vOWjEEPDq9mk-mlA4eVBE=)**
---

Thank you for joining me in this fight,
Sri Preston Kulkarni

**[DONATE NOW](https://act.myngp.com/el/JegZPKVgIxnSh9JK_wQdnJFswYlpLJ4ziVzD9NiJuZo=/swTHmKvYKxQha7uoAuAwO4VXnaipaLXPDZ8Nt7lmlDY=?refcode=20190917opioidjaemail)**
---

**STAY CONNECTED WITH OUR MOVEMENT**
**[](https://act.myngp.com/el/JegZPKVgIxnSh9JK_wQdnJFswYlpLJ4ziVzD9NiJuZo=/xQdLk9U-rFJ77I7HF3FCHX0WTuLTfACY-8vYpOx2xgM=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/JegZPKVgIxnSh9JK_wQdnJFswYlpLJ4ziVzD9NiJuZo=/faa14KUeO1BkK4P2DklmtwzoOAvN8chS5FFgyN5R-o0=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/JegZPKVgIxnSh9JK_wQdnJFswYlpLJ4ziVzD9NiJuZo=/Rb3o4Ter2goAnZpTRNGKX3ixDJhFtm5vF9CZzeIGehU=)**

But we can't shy away from the work that is required. = = Thank you for joining me in this fight, Sri Preston Kulkarni STAY CONNECTED WITH OUR MOVEMENT = = = Paid for by Sri for Congress. Sri for Congress PO Box 898 Sugar Land TX 77478 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to longer receive emails from us, please =.

name: America Next
subject: Did you see Bobby on Fox News
body:
Democrats are alienating voters as people realize how bad this impeachment charade is for the country. [ ](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=ea6c5cbfa4c8487cb16aa85e0ccace45&_e=1rb3Onb0VDxCs30Yp1nasfPLOS4ZeKlc5myn63jHdHafcbwXRrjW4dSDVJKhVtOkkLHUdqsNdhUfvVfEK11QwRziRZXjEQxMkBx2cTfLSyBHMm6wfaVSO48wtj2W0_NCZHHAtvY09RGcapbHFpqV2-5OAZLKVUKULWWfPOGCPQwOm4Z31WqyfMtTR3HUuQtW4Xoy0hw1bPD-wgugwxbR661p5_s2Wkhe-qefAEmN-EQMyURxgxUF_9lzgbUvnCyhwBMeMIYLTJeKofiLfeV2jg%3D%3D) In case you missed it, Bobby sat down with Fox News yesterday to discuss the seemingly never-ending impeachment proceedings against President Trump. Click below to watch: [ ](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=ea6c5cbfa4c8487cb16aa85e0ccace45&_e=1rb3Onb0VDxCs30Yp1nasX-BHo5TxIfT-AotzD2Hvt9x317G7Xw09gL2Qp9KwvNPF2Jgbv-NnCslUJ1HeGXkuQYHzoHaSbqc4NCCPvbW5g61PHy0Wm80_YEK4h-xqrEzElPaN3ic1OizkbE4NCWtYMM9AEcirjlGInhugyoBmcggI5iwiMePIYrmWxPmSYhImCULT0jiR1121KomviUVQPgLVhk3G-FdfMOxGm2lbzHHEq5cL4tTX3tVyhEysfcPSM51xBQadlON6lX1WXu0hF3AqILa7ykXC4ZjwyjKwkE%3D) There’s a reason why Nancy Pelosi and moderate Democrats don’t want this to happen: they know that every minute they’re spending on impeachment is another minute that they’re not focusing on issues Americans actually care about. **Just like Medicare for All and the Green New Deal, these calls for impeachment are nothing more than a way to appease the radical base of the Democratic Party.**

Everyday Americans on the other hand, know that the Mueller Report found no evidence of collusion, they know there were none of the bombshells that those on the far Left were hoping for, and they know that Democrats are simply trying to overturn the results of a fair election.

Democrats are alienating voters as people realize how bad this impeachment charade is for the country. The more they continue, the more likely they are to hand the election to President Trump in 2020.

Sincerely,

America Next [ UNSUBSCRIBE HERE ](http://mail.americanxt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_s=ea6c5cbfa4c8487cb16aa85e0ccace45&_t=mqvZjpqpxb21E29X6MfEPhehUAIRuuulktGUuCy2TM_bCbuJ_Xjc83RfP2sgl8aUc85jOaocNHIlCJl4i4BpZ5RSHI_7tJNcEtSQpNUO8YR7UHkTihwjOfmeJwVLqLFQgj2hW5OaZ_kfWA5YxN7FUufWjpGxjEOjD90VnIEOeyg%3D) Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by America Next PO Box 320966, Alexandria, VA 22320
---

name: J.D. Scholten
subject: El Paso
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdelpaso [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdelpaso]
Peter,
Over the weekend, I visited El Paso, Texas, where Steve King loves to visit. Instead of talking about low commodity prices, the skyrocketing cost of prescription drugs, or wage stagnation, he’s drinking out of a toilet-fountain to prove that conditions at border facilities are acceptable. He’s complaining about immigrants and wrongly using them as a scapegoat for the problems our nation is facing.
I went to the border to find out the truth, and learned from Congresswoman Veronica Escobar, who represents the district. Check out our Medium page to read my full reflection for yourself. [https://medium.com/@jdscholten/https-medium-com-jdscholten-setting-the-record-straight-ba4f0e49fb72]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdelpaso [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdelpaso]
The truth is that both Iowa and our country have a long history of welcoming immigrants. No better example is when the late Republican Governor Robert Ray offered Tai Dam political refugees from Vietnam, Laos, Burma, Cambodia, and Thailand a home in Iowa. We rely on immigrants to support and grow our economy, and for their invaluable contributions to the political, social, and cultural fabric of our country.
Our immigration system should match who we are: it should reflect our values and our founding, and enable our country to reach its greatest economic heights. [https://medium.com/@jdscholten/https-medium-com-jdscholten-setting-the-record-straight-ba4f0e49fb72]
Let’s live up to our ideals together,
J.D. Scholten
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdelpaso [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdelpaso]
Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
Scholten4Iowa
P.O. Box 3531
Sioux City, IA 51102
United States

name: Voter Protection Project
subject: Amy McGrath can defeat McConnell
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
---
| | Peter -- top political data expert Nate Silver thinks that fighter pilot Amy McGrath can win in 2020. name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Please stand with military families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, Earlier this month, Trump decided to build his border wall with funds meant to build schools for military families and improve housing on bases across the globe. Then, his Secretary of Defense said other countries should pay for these improvements instead of the U.S., reneging on promises made to American service families. Now, he's decided that children of service members will be the next target of his draconian, bigoted views on citizenship. He wants to deny the children of military families and foreign service officers working overseas citizenship under certain conditions. This right to American citizenship should be automatic for children of service members, but Trump has once again shown that he does not value service and sacrifice \-- he only values unquestioning loyalty to his racist, xenophobic administration. [**Today, we 're asking you to add your name to ours and demand the Trump administration restore citizenship rights to ALL children of U.S. citizens stationed abroad. We must stand up for military families and speak out against Trump's mistreatment of our service members!**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd13/6e9863e8/14d21a47/1db0dda9/3787502282/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/citizenship-military-kids/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC") Thanks for standing with us! The WDTO Team [SIGN THE PETITION](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd13/6e9863e8/14d21a47/1db0dda9/3787502282/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/citizenship-military-kids/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC")
---

**Here 's the reality: Nearly a thousand of Tennessee bridges are considered "structurally deficient."** But politicians in Washington have prioritized political fights rather than making the investments we need to rebuild roads and bridges and expand 21st Century infrastructure into rural Tennessee.
We need to address this issue. Safer roads for drivers and broadband access in rural areas is something _everyone_ can get behind -- we just need to work together. In the Senate, I'll make it a top priority.
[_**That 's what I said in our latest campaign video. Watch it and then donate to help send me to the Senate where I'll fight for infrastructure investment for our communities.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa212/18d6a294/4cfd42e9/26d655e2/1952376153/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUxOTA5MTdzIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im5zIn0%3D/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme190917s?refcode=jme190917s_ns_other&refcode2=107423")
Thank you,
James

name: Greg Stanton
subject: My thoughts on the Arizona Supreme Court decision »
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
[****](https://act.myngp.com/el/ukQbNaw8vxkrs1-7fiQQywPzJ3j4SoxegBfEx5d-LD4=/5wRjQHVGP0hh7OGOvzEcxCKht0CoInNpS3IVR55boow=?refcode=X_091619_AZSupremeCourt_A&amount=25&recurring=auto)

**This week, the Arizona Supreme Court ruled against the freedoms of LGBTQ Arizonans in a case that undermines a Phoenix city ordinance protecting LGBTQ residents from discrimination.**

When I was Mayor of Phoenix, I was proud to work with the City Council in 2013 to pass this historic non-discrimination ordinance, which was seen as a huge step forward for equality in our city.

Sadly, this week's ruling puts at risk all of the progress we made in our city and our state to secure equality for all, regardless of one's sexual orientation or gender identity.

The plaintiffs in this case were represented by the "Alliance Defending Freedom," which is classified as a hate group by the Southern Poverty Law Center for their anti-LGBTQ stances. _Clearly, this case was never about religious freedom, it was always intended as an attack on the liberties of the LGBTQ community._

**I want to make sure that every member of Arizona 's LGBTQ community knows that I will continue fighting for you, and I will not let this ruling stop our work in Congress to secure equal rights for all in Arizona.**

I am proud to fight for all Arizonans,

\-- _Greg Stanton_

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ukQbNaw8vxkrs1-7fiQQywPzJ3j4SoxegBfEx5d-LD4=/iKkTs1aL3q8et1X1m06aSu5h-oHeJHDtZ8mHSf5OrEk=?refcode=X_091619_AZSupremeCourt_A&amount=25&recurring=auto)

Paid for by Stanton for Congress

name: Francis Conole
subject: Wish Stephanie a happy birthday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Conole for Congress
body:
Beating Republicans who have unlimited special interest money is tough. | [](conoleforcongress.com)
---

| | Today is an important day, our Finance Director Stephanie's birthday! [WISH HER HAPPY BIRTHDAY](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-steph-birthday?amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=1+-+WISH+HER+HAPPY+BIRTHDAY&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190917_1_1&source=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190917_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190917_1_1") Stephanie is turning 24 and has already accomplished so much.

She is an incredible human being, has won 3 national college dance competitions at Saint Joseph's University, and most importantly is a loving cat mom to Luna (who makes occasional much-appreciated appearances here at Conole HQ.)

However, beating Republicans who have unlimited special interest money is a hard job -- especially since we need to report our numbers publicly after our Federal Elections Commission (FEC) filing deadline at the end of this month.

[**That 's why I'm reaching out to surprise her for her birthday by helping her raise $8,000 by the end of this week to stay on track. Chip in $5 right now!**](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-steph-birthday?amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=2+-+Thatrsquos+why+Irsquom+reaching+out+to+s&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190917_1_1&source=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190917_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190917_1_1") [](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-steph-birthday?amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190917_1_1&source=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190917_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190917_1_1") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below. Otherwise, you will be redirected to a donation page._ | [$5](https://conole.bsd.%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-steph-birthday?amount=5&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=4+-+5&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190917_1_1&source=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190917_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190917_1_1") | [$20](https://conole.bsd.%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-steph-birthday?amount=20&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=5+-+20&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190917_1_1&source=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190917_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190917_1_1") | [$50](https://conole.bsd.%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-steph-birthday?amount=50&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=6+-+50&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190917_1_1&source=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190917_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190917_1_1")

Without Stephanie's great work as Finance Director, we would not be able to run our grassroots campaign.

That's why I appreciate you taking the time to wish her a happy birthday by making a contribution. [**Give the present of staying on track for our grassroots fundraising goals with a donation here!**](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-steph-birthday?amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=10+-+Give+the+present+of+staying+on+track+for&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190917_1_1&source=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190917_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190917_1_1")

Yours in service,

Francis

|
---

_This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Francis Conole is running to represent New York 's 24th Congressional District to bring fresh leadership to Central NY. A fourth-generation Syracusan and Iraq War veteran, he has dedicated his life to service and sacrifice. name: Khizr Khan
subject: RE: Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | I asked before Trump's rally.
Now I'm asking again. That's how disgusted I am with Trump's division and hate politics.

Donald Trump attacked my faith. He attacked my family. He attacked my fallen son.

**And less than 24 hours ago, he came to New Mexico, attacked Democrats like my dear friend, Ben Ray, and pledged to flip this state red.**

[_**I 'd do everything humanly possible to strip Trump and his Republican Senate of their power and their politics of hate and division. >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190917_em_fr_b2_khan_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")

But I can't do it by myself.

I need your help in this critical moment to ensure Ben Ray can defend against Trump's attacks, win his Senate race, and keep this state in Democrats' hands.

I need 1,056 patriots to step up before midnight. Can I count on your $5? | | ****[**Chip in $5 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190917_em_fr_b2_khan_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")****

Respectfully,

Khizr Khan
|
---
[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4ad/18e32a7f/532036e7/7bfe7d0a/1284697370/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4ad/18e32a7f/532036e7/7bfe7d09/1284697370/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4ad/18e32a7f/532036e7/7bfe7d0f/1284697370/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4ad/18e32a7f/532036e7/7bfe7d0d/1284697370/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4ad/18e32a7f/532036e7/7bfe7d03/1284697370/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4ad/18e32a7f/532036e7/7bfe7d00/1284697370/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: staff@maggiehassan.com
subject: what'll we tell the boss?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Senator Hassan reached out -- twice! -- because our fundraising has really fallen off a cliff.
[**Could you please donate $3 or more right now to help us get back on track? We 'll explain more about why it matters below.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc39f/2a380d31/3dae0533/f0daf8/611874163/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE5MDkxN190dWVzMl82bW8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20190917_tues2_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
Maggie is one of the most vulnerable Democrats in the country (she only won by a fraction of a percent in 2016). This means that a single missed goal could spell disaster for protecting this seat.
We have to publicly report our fundraising at the end of the month and Republicans will use our number to inform their strategy for winning back this seat. The more we raise, the better off we'll be.
Maggie doesn't rely on corporate special interests to bankroll her campaign so when we fall behind, the only way we make up ground is by people like you giving to emails like this one.
[**So, everyone, could you please chip in -- $3 or more would be perfect -- to stop Republicans from flipping this seat back to a Trump supporter's control**?](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc39f/2a380d31/3dae0533/f0daf8/611874163/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE5MDkxN190dWVzMl82bW8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20190917_tues2_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
We're running out of time and we really don't want to have to tell the boss that we're still in a rut.
Thank you for helping. Your donation really does make a huge difference.
-- Maggie's campaign staff
> [Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc39f/2a380d31/3dae0533/f0daf8/611874163/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE5MDkxN190dWVzMl82bW8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20190917_tues2_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")

_ _
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc39f/2a380d31/3dae0533/f0daf9/611874163/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

name: Laura Loomer
subject: The Democrats Can’t Wait
body:
In 13 days, we’ll be submitting our fundraising report to the Federal Election Commission.
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-348049-806119-4649803-272a2ccff1-96ecd78183)
Patriot,

[](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-348049-806119-4649802-7bd326f082-96ecd78183) In 13 days, we’ll be submitting our fundraising report to the Federal Election Commission.

With time running out, I’m asking you to [**contribute to my congressional campaign**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-348049-806119-4649802-7bd326f082-96ecd78183) before we file this important report. Time is running out!

My Democrat opponent, Lois Frankel, will definitely be reviewing the report as soon as it comes out – and **so will her friend, Nancy Pelosi**.

Just a few months ago, I paid a visit to Nancy’s California mansion, hopped the stone wall surrounding her home, and setup camp with a group of illegal aliens from Mexico and Guatemala, to bring attention to the Speaker of the House’s total hypocrisy on immigration reform.

I’m the last thing that Nancy Pelosi, Ilhan Omar, AOC, Rashida Tlaib and the rest of the “Hamas Caucus” want to see in the halls of Congress.

But that can only happen with your help . . . [**please donate here**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-348049-806119-4649802-7bd326f082-96ecd78183).

This will be the first fundraising report submitted by my campaign and the stronger the report, the more media and support I’ll receive.

When I announced my candidacy for Florida’s 21st Congressional District, there was a flurry of outrage and mocking by leftist reporters and even the Democrat Party’s Congressional Committee, the DCCC.

The DCCC issued the statement, “This is today’s Washington Republican Party, a full-blown white nationalist is running for Congress in Florida. Republicans must condemn Loomer’s hate-filled message or they own it.”

But their tactic to slander a conservative, Jewish woman by calling her a “white nationalist” didn’t work and I was able to garner the endorsements of prominent Republicans including Rep. Paul Gosar and Conservative radio host Wayne Allyn Root.

And you can join them in backing my campaign today [**by donating here**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-348049-806119-4649802-7bd326f082-96ecd78183).

After their failed media attacks, **the new tactic of Democrats is to IGNORE my campaign**.

There has been a near black out of coverage of my run for Congress within the last month.

But in 13 days, they’ll be scrambling to write headlines about the strength of this campaign – **good or bad**.

And I would like your help to make that FEC report as strong as possible . . . [**please donate here**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-348049-806119-4649802-7bd326f082-96ecd78183).

We’re not far away from hitting our fundraising goals, and every dollar you can donate gets us one step closer to forcing a liberal reporter to admit that “Laura Loomer for Congress” is no joke or stunt as they’ve said in the past.

My goal is to win this election and take my experience as an investigative reporter into Congress and put it to work.

[**But I need you to help me get there.**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-348049-806119-4649802-7bd326f082-96ecd78183)

Only 13 days remain until our fundraising report is due with the FEC, so please, donate today.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

P.S. In my last email I wrote, I mentioned Judge Jeanine Pirro’s kind words she wrote about me in her new book. Since then, she’s been attacked for writing about me. I’ll send you a screenshot of the attack from the senior CNN reporter tomorrow. In the meantime, [**please help me hit our fundraising goal by clicking here**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-348049-806119-4649802-7bd326f082-96ecd78183).

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.
---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-561017072-4395-348049-806119-84585d41bbe610b-96ecd78183)

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Trump wants voters to pay for his "strong" economy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, Trump has made it clear he needs a strong economy to win re-election. Nothing scares him more than an economic downturn before the 2020 election, which looks more and more likely. Some critical indicators of recession have started to go off, and Americans are worried that the global recession a decade ago may be repeating itself. Now, Trump wants the Federal Reserve to lower interest rates to boost the economy. He even suggested that interest rates should go into the negative, following the example of the European Central Bank. While negative interest rates sound good on paper, what it actually means is that banks will ratchet up fees for consumers so that the banks can keep turning profits. Trump hopes voters won't notice paying more out of pocket to help the banks and bail out his ego-boosting "strong" economy, so we're asking average American voters what they think: **Do you think Trump is good for the economy?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd15/6e9863e8/14cfb588/1db0ddac/1911804307/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/T5x6PEn") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd15/6e9863e8/14cfb588/1db0ddac/1911804307/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/T5x6PEn") Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd15/6e9863e8/14cfb588/1db0ddb2/1911804307/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=WDTO20190917c.ND-b&refcode2=ZZUDzZwbNvMTtR1Yrdkf")

President Trump’s corrupt former campaign manager, Corey Lewandowski, underwent intense scrutiny today in front of the House Judiciary Committee in what some folks are calling the beginning of an impeachment investigation into the president.
This spectacle was an embarrassment for Democrats and Republicans alike. A once laudable institution devolved into chaos over a president who only cares about how he can use his position of power to enrich himself and his friends.
But despite the televised circus that went on today, it’s clear both from the Mueller report and what’s been reported in the news **that Donald Trump, his campaign, and his cabal of cronies broke the law and have obstructed justice to cover it up.**

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Tonight: We're holding the Senate floor for gun reform
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
**[We need your support in the fight for universal background checks. Add your name to stand with Senate Democrats now.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c24/42ab3cf4/61dd3a1c/135d79fe/2202478868/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/we-need-background-checks-now?source=em190917&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
Peter,
Senate Democrats are holding the Senate floor tonight demanding that Majority Leader Mitch McConnell call a vote on the House-passed universal background checks legislation. We cannot accept GOP delay or inaction while Americans continue to die from gun violence every day.
The Democratic House did their job--they passed a bill that requires background checks for every gun purchase in the United States. Now it's time for the Senate to act. So we're calling on Leader McConnell to stop standing in the way and bring this bill to the Senate floor for a vote.
**[Are you with us in the fight for universal background checks, Peter? Add your name now.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c24/42ab3cf4/61dd3a1c/135d79fe/2202478868/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/we-need-background-checks-now?source=em190917&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
The overwhelming majority of Americans support universal background checks because they understand that commonsense gun safety reform will keep our families safe and save countless innocent lives. So why is the GOP refusing to take action? This is a complete and total failure of leadership--and the consequences are devastating.
We cannot afford to let up in this fight. Americans are counting on us to pass this bill and Senate Democrats are doing everything we can because we know that peoples' lives are on the line.
**[Sign on now to stand with me and my fellow Senate Democrats in the fight for universal background checks.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c24/42ab3cf4/61dd3a1c/135d79fe/2202478868/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/we-need-background-checks-now?source=em190917&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
My best,
Dick Durbin
**[Sign the Petition](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c24/42ab3cf4/61dd3a1c/135d79fe/2202478868/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/we-need-background-checks-now?source=em190917&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**

* * *
